contexts.context: LQ: I sent some notes to the <mark>mailing</mark> list.
… When I asked the XSL <mark>mailing</mark> list, xsl:iterate was very popular,…
…appeared to be editorial, but response on the <mark>mailing</mark> list suggested that discussion was warranted.
…wildcard is set to. I’ll review and send some <mark>mail</mark>.
